content: Self-Refine's iterative single-model self-feedback framework can be structurally modified to incorporate the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives explored in LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid multi-perspective self-refinement pipeline that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervised data while boosting output quality by resolving perspective inconsistencies. This hybrid approach outperforms both single-perspective Self-Refine and standalone multi-perspective reflection by leveraging the strengths of iterative refinement and diverse critical feedback simultaneously.
